description: Student detail page + compact list layout
changes: 👤 Tap any student name to open full detail page
📊 Detail page shows: fee summary, monthly breakdown, leave periods, payment history
💳 Pay Now & Edit buttons on detail page bottom action bar
📋 Student list redesigned to compact single-line rows — no more scrolling
🏖️ Leave period badge shown inline in compact list
🗑️ Remove leave fields from Add Student form — manage via Edit only
